# walkthru.earth

> People-first urban intelligence. Detecting hidden patterns of daily life and turning them into solutions that support wellbeing in cities globally.

## About

walkthru.earth builds open infrastructure and tools to understand and improve urban life. We combine IoT sensor data, open geospatial datasets, and anonymous community wellbeing data to create neighborhood-level health and livability insights. Founded March 2025.

Mission: To reveal the hidden patterns shaping daily life and turn them into people-first solutions that support wellbeing in cities everywhere.

## Website Pages

- Homepage: https://walkthru.earth
- Globe Explorer (interactive 3D globe with 16 data layers): https://walkthru.earth/indices
- OpenSensor.Space (weather station network): https://walkthru.earth/opensensor
- Hormones & Cities (neighborhood health insights app): https://walkthru.earth/hormones-cities
- Software (desktop & mobile tools): https://walkthru.earth/software
- Objex (cloud storage explorer with geospatial visualization): https://walkthru.earth/software/objex
- Imagery Desktop (aerial/satellite image management): https://walkthru.earth/software/imagery-desktop
- About: https://walkthru.earth/about
- Links: https://walkthru.earth/links
- Privacy Policy: https://walkthru.earth/privacy

## Projects

### Globe Explorer
Interactive 3D globe for exploring terrain, population, buildings, weather, and 50+ livability indices worldwide. 16 data layers, ~300 GB of open data, real-time weather. Runs entirely in the browser using DuckDB-WASM — no account needed. Built on cloud-optimized geospatial formats (GeoParquet, COG, PMTiles).
URL: https://walkthru.earth/indices

### OpenSensor.Space
DIY weather station network measuring air quality (PM2.5, PM10), noise, temperature, humidity, and light in real time. Built with Raspberry Pi and Enviro+ sensors. Data streams directly to cloud storage as Parquet files with Hive partitioning. Open hardware, open data, serverless architecture.
URL: https://walkthru.earth/opensensor
Dashboard: https://opensensor.space

### Hormones & Cities
Mobile app (launching mid-2026) for sharing anonymous wellbeing and mobility data. Users share how they feel; data is processed on-device, aggregated to H3 hexagonal cells (~500m), and shared back as neighborhood health insights. Offline-first, privacy by design, no account needed, no tracking. The more people contribute, the smarter the picture gets.
URL: https://walkthru.earth/hormones-cities

### Objex
Cloud storage explorer with geospatial visualization. Browse and manage S3, GCS, R2, and other cloud storage buckets with built-in support for geospatial file formats. Desktop app built with Tauri.
URL: https://walkthru.earth/software/objex
GitHub: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/objex

### Imagery Desktop
Desktop application for managing aerial and satellite imagery collections.
URL: https://walkthru.earth/software/imagery-desktop
GitHub: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/imagery-desktop

## Four Planetary Indices

All indices share the same H3 cell ID for easy SQL joins. Stored in open table formats, sorted by h3_index for optimized range queries.

1. **Terrain** — GEDTM 30m GeoTIFF source. Elevation, slope, aspect, ruggedness. 287 GB, H3 res 1-10.
2. **Buildings** — 2.75 billion polygons (Global Building Atlas). Density, height, footprint, volume. 2.6 GB, H3 res 3-8.
3. **Population** — WorldPop SSP2 projections. 2025-2100 growth, 16 timesteps. 4.5 GB, H3 res 1-8.
4. **Weather** — NOAA AI-NWP (GraphCast). Temperature, wind, pressure, precipitation. 3.6 GB/forecast, H3 res 5.

## Data Formats

- GeoParquet (with native Parquet 2.11+ GEOMETRY)
- Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF (COG)
- PMTiles
- FlatGeobuf
- Snappy-compressed Parquet with Hive partitioning
- H3 hexagonal grid indexing

## Open Data on Source Cooperative

All datasets are published as open data:

- Source Cooperative organization: https://source.coop/walkthru-earth
- DEM-Terrain — Global terrain data (elevation, slope, aspect) on H3 hexagonal grids as Parquet: https://source.coop/walkthru-earth/dem-terrain
- Walkthru-Indices — Comprehensive livability metrics for sustainable communities: https://source.coop/walkthru-earth/indices
- OpenSensor.Space — Real-time environmental sensor data in Parquet format: https://source.coop/walkthru-earth/opensensor-space

## GitHub Repositories

Organization: https://github.com/walkthru-earth

### Core Data Pipelines
- **walkthru-weather-index** — Event-driven weather downscaling pipeline: NOAA AI-NWP to H3 hexagonal grid to partitioned Parquet on S3: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/walkthru-weather-index
- **walkthru-pop-index** — Global population projections (WorldPop SSP 1km) to H3-indexed GeoParquet: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/walkthru-pop-index
- **walkthru-building-index** — Global Building Atlas LOD1 (2.75B buildings) to H3-indexed GeoParquet + Pyramid GeoParquet with native Parquet 2.11+ GEOMETRY: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/walkthru-building-index
- **dem-terrain** — Global DEM to H3-indexed native Parquet 2.11+ terrain derivatives: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/dem-terrain
- **h3-migration** — Migrate walkthru-earth S3 Parquet files to optimized H3 int64 schema (v2): https://github.com/walkthru-earth/h3-migration
- **walkthru-data** — walkthru-data registry and taps: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/walkthru-data
- **walkthru-datastore** — High-performance ESRI-compatible geospatial REST API server with zero-copy vector tile generation using DuckDB + orb architecture: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/walkthru-datastore

### OpenSensor
- **opensensor-space** — Decentralized, serverless dashboard for OpenSensor Network. Real-time environmental data from independent stations syncing to public cloud storage (AWS, GCS, R2): https://github.com/walkthru-earth/opensensor-space
- **opensensor-enviroplus** — Lightweight, edge-first pipeline for collecting Enviro+ sensor data on Raspberry Pi and syncing to cloud object storage. Data stored as Parquet with Hive partitioning: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/opensensor-enviroplus
- **opensensor-space-edge** — Edge computing for OpenSensor: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/opensensor-space-edge
- **esp32s3-parquet-test** — Proof-of-concept: Snappy-compressed Parquet files on ESP32-S3, uploaded to AWS S3: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/esp32s3-parquet-test
- **esp32s3-webhook** — ESP32-S3 Discord webhook demo with Rust and HTTPS: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/esp32s3-webhook

### Software & Tools
- **objex** — Cloud storage explorer with geospatial visualization: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/objex
- **imagery-desktop** — Aerial/satellite image management desktop app: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/imagery-desktop
- **react-native-duckdb** — DuckDB bindings for React Native: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/react-native-duckdb

### Geospatial & Infrastructure
- **mapserver-parquet** — MapServer with Parquet support via GDAL Arrow/Parquet driver or DuckDB: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/mapserver-parquet
- **stac-cms-template** — Git-based CMS for authoring STAC metadata with visual map editing, automatic validation, no server required: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/stac-cms-template
- **qgis-server** — QGIS Server Docker image, production ready with Apache/Lighttpd/spawn-fcgi: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/qgis-server
- **walkthru-earth.github.io** — Website source code (Next.js): https://github.com/walkthru-earth/walkthru-earth.github.io
- **walkthru-cn-auth-worker** — Cloudflare auth worker: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/walkthru-cn-auth-worker
- **iso-trans** — ISO translation utilities: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/iso-trans

### Other
- **talks** — Presentations and slides: https://github.com/walkthru-earth/talks
